title: verbesina guatemalensis var. glabrata
intro: Verbesina guatemalensis var. glabrata is a plant species of the daisy family, known for its medicinal properties and traditional uses in herbal medicine. The plant is reported to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits. It is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as to promote wound healing and reduce pain. In terms of herbal preparations, Verbesina guatemalensis var. glabrata is traditionally used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
